1804090.name: Moon Dancer Demo
1804090.description:
Moon Dancer is a vertically scrolling shmup featuring an exhilarating lock-on laser. The user controls the fighter "Moon Dancer" equipped with shots and lock-on lasers to defeat the enemy.

In the demo version, you can only play Caravan mode. Caravan mode is a 3-minute limited challenge to get a high score.
1804090.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙, 日语
